The recent news of a US-Iran ceasefire plan and the US refinery processing Venezuelan oil may alleviate some of the economic uncertainty and lead to a short-term price increase in BCO_USD.
Oil price plunge and geopolitical de-escalation (US-Iran ceasefire) reduce Brent crude demand, pressuring BCO_USD. Recent bullish trend faces reversal amid risk-off sentiment.

The recent news of a US-Iran ceasefire plan and the subsequent plunge in oil prices may lead to a decrease in BCO_USD, but the overall bullish trend and potential for increased oil production could support a rebound in the next 4-8 hours. The current market context and risk sentiment shifts also suggest a potential buying opportunity.
